name: memlume-claude-code
description: Connect Claude Code turns to a local Memlume Shared Brain.

memlume_home.title: Memlume Core directory
memlume_home.description: The local Memlume repository containing built Core packages.

daemon_url.title: Memlume daemon URL
daemon_url.description: Loopback URL of the local Memlume daemon.

adapter_token.title: Memlume adapter token
adapter_token.description: Token for this Claude Code installation only.

installation_id.title: Installation ID
installation_id.description: Memlume installation identity for Claude Code.

profile_id.title: Profile ID
profile_id.description: Memlume profile identity for Claude Code.

project_id.title: Project ID
project_id.description: Memlume project identity for this shared brain.

brain_id.title: Project Brain ID
brain_id.description: UUIDv7 of the mounted Memlume Project Brain.

workspace_path.title: Workspace path
workspace_path.description: Optional workspace path when it differs from Claude Code cwd.
